channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Gaussian Mixture Attention: Linear-Time Sequence Mixing via Probabilistic Latent Routing
item.description: Gaussian Mixture Attention reduces Transformer attention from O(N²) to O(NK) through probabilistic routing via learned mixture components.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Breaking the Solver Bottleneck: Training Task Generators at the Learnable Frontier
item.description: PROPEL trains task generators using a proxy model to predict learnability, replacing expensive solver rollouts and increasing frontier-difficulty tasks for code and software engineering.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CODEBLOCK: Learning to Supervise Code at the Right Granularity
item.description: CodeBlock selectively applies training loss to syntactically complete code blocks rather than individual tokens, achieving better performance while using only 1.9% of response tokens.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Artemis: Anatomy-Resolved inTervention for Eliminating Multimodal NeuroImage confounderS
item.description: Artemis is a causal intervention framework that corrects for demographic confounders in multimodal neuroimaging data at the region level for graph neural networks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Link between Shock-wave Theory and Symmetry-reduced Stochastic Gradient Descent for Artificial Neural Networks
item.description: Mathematical framework connects shock-wave theory to neural network training dynamics via symmetry reduction and Hamilton-Jacobi equations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Attribution-Guided and Coverage-Maximized Pruning for Structural MoE Compression
item.description: Attribution-guided structural pruning framework compresses MoE models by identifying redundant channels within experts, achieving 5.27x memory reduction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Fisher Width: A Geometric Measure of Complexity on Statistical Manifolds
item.description: Researchers introduce Fisher width, a geometric complexity measure for statistical manifolds based on the Fisher information metric, extending Gaussian width theory.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] DRIFT: Refining Instruction Data via On-Policy Data Attribution
item.description: DRIFT identifies high-value training data by applying on-policy influence functions to refine instruction data for LLMs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TRIDENT: Breaking the Hybrid-Safety-Physics Coupling for Provably Safe Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
item.description: TRIDENT: Breaking the Hybrid-Safety-Physics Coupling for Provably Safe Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SAGE: Retain-Aware Post-Hoc Sanitization of Final Unlearning Vector
item.description: SAGE: Retain-Aware Post-Hoc Sanitization of Final Unlearning Vector

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Ghost Attractor Networks: Basin-Structured Dynamical Decoders for Closed-Loop Sequential Generation
item.description: Ghost Attractor Networks: Basin-Structured Dynamical Decoders for Closed-Loop Sequential Generation

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Survey on Data-Driven Models for Soil Moisture Regression and Classification
item.description: A Survey on Data-Driven Models for Soil Moisture Regression and Classification

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Enhanced Graph Neural Networks using K-Hop Gaussian Diffusion
item.description: Enhanced Graph Neural Networks using K-Hop Gaussian Diffusion

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ASTRA: A Scalable Next-Generation ATCO Training Simulator with Autonomous Simpilots
item.description: ASTRA: A Scalable Next-Generation ATCO Training Simulator with Autonomous Simpilots

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SAE Interventions are Unreliable: Post-Intervention Recovery of Suppressed Behavior
item.description: SAE Interventions are Unreliable: Post-Intervention Recovery of Suppressed Behavior

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Why SWAVE May Not Be All You Need:A Concept-Evolution Retrospective on Complex-Valued Recurrent Language Models
item.description: Why SWAVE May Not Be All You Need:A Concept-Evolution Retrospective on Complex-Valued Recurrent Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Neural Network Implementation of the Renormalization Group for Fault Diagnosis with Class Imbalance
item.description: Neural Network Implementation of the Renormalization Group for Fault Diagnosis with Class Imbalance

item.description: Self-CTRL: Self-Consistency Training with Reinforcement Learning

item.description: ThousandWorlds: A benchmark for climate emulation of potentially habitable exoplanets

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Do Time Series Foundation Model Benchmarks Hide Regime-Dependent Failures? Evidence from Traffic Speed Forecasting
item.description: Do Time Series Foundation Model Benchmarks Hide Regime-Dependent Failures? Evidence from Traffic Speed Forecasting

item.description: From Sparse Features to Trustworthy Proxies: Certifying SAE-Based Interpretability

item.description: SCOPE-FL: A Strategy-proof Chain-based Optimal pareto efficient Federated Learning System

item.description: LLMZero: Discovering Adaptive Training Strategies for RL Post-Training via LLM Agents
